title: triticum ovatum var. ponticum
intro: Triticum ovatum var. ponticum, also known as Pontic wheat or Pontic emmer wheat, is a rare subspecies of the wheat species Triticum ovatum. It is an ancient type of wheat that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, providing health benefits such as improved wound healing and reduced risk of certain diseases. Triticum ovatum var. ponticum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
